author: lOrm
content: Already addressed by #408 fix. validate_branch_name in src/tools/worktree.rs:69-156 rejects '..' (line 126-130), leading dashes, shell metacharacters, control chars, and git ref-syntax specials BEFORE any git invocation. Path traversal vector ("branch":"../../tmp/escape") is rejected. Tests: validate_branch_name_rejects_double_dot_408, enter_worktree_rejects_path_traversal_branch_408. With '..' upstream-rejected, git_root.join('.worktrees').join(&branch) cannot escape .worktrees/. Closing as duplicate-of-already-fixed.
